title: The Power That Draws and Keeps in Church
summary: “And I, if I be lifted up from the earth, will draw all men unto me. This he said, signifying what death he should die”(John 12:32-33). There is a power, an infinite and unstoppable power, which draws and keeps us in the church. This power is the same power that raised up the body of the Lord Jesus Christ from the dead. This power is the power of the Holy Spirit of Jesus. Are you struggling to go to church? Are you struggling to stay in church on a regular basis? Then this message is for you – look to the resurrected Lord Jesus Christ who draws by his Holy Spirit and will sustain your church life until he returns.
